details.test: Task 1: Book cheapest 2-night yoga retreat under $600 with rating 4.5+
Task 2: Schedule 90-min deep tissue massage on Saturday afternoon with 4.8+ rated therapist
Task 3: Create 3-treatment custom spa package within duration and price rules
Task 4: Book cheapest 3-night balcony room with breakfast under $250/night
Task 5: Purchase $150 digital spa gift card with personalized message
Task 6: Book 1-day spa pass for two with lunch and conditional hydrotherapy under $220
Task 7: Book retreat with vegetarian meals and daily yoga under $1500 (detox/yoga fallback)
Task 8: Create account and set wellness goals for stress relief and better sleep
